reviews.comment:
Nunca me
Gusto YPF fui a acompañar a mi esposo a cargar nafta ! Siempre cola con empleados que atienden muy lentamente !!! Aguante axion

(Translated by Google)
I never liked YPF. I went with my husband to fill up! There's always a line and the employees are incredibly slow! Long live Axion!
